prompt: Create a high-quality, premium eyewear advertisement in a minimalist editorial style. LAYOUT & STYLE: Vertical composition (poster/ad style), Warm beige background with soft gradient, Clean, luxury aesthetic (Balenciaga/Lenskart vibe), Cinematic soft lighting, sharp focus, subtle grain, No watermark, no extra UI elements. MAIN SUBJECT: A confident female model sitting relaxed on a sofa, Pose: arms spread casually, calm and powerful expression, Outfit: neutral-toned t-shirt and lounge pants with a light jacket, Accessories: modern stylish sunglasses (sleek, white or minimal frame). FACE REPLACEMENT: Replace the model’s face using: [REFERENCE IMAGE – FACE ONLY], Keep original pose, lighting, skin tone consistency, and realism. TEXT ELEMENTS: Large bold headline behind subject: “LENSKART” (big, white, stretched typography), Left side small text: “do more”, Right side small text: “be more”, T-shirt branding: “A&H” (center chest, bold, clean block style). CLEANUP: Remove any extra text, Keep composition minimal and premium. FINAL LOOK: Ultra sharp, editorial fashion ad quality, Balanced typography and subject, Focus on modern eyewear branding.
